payload.title: EEO Report – 4th Quarter 2023
payload.description: EEO 4th Quarter 2023 report for MTA Metro-North Railroad, including workforce demographics, utilization analysis, new hires/separations, and complaints data as of December 31, 2023

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

payload.description: MTA commuter rail agency, subject of the EEO Report – 4th Quarter 2023

payload.claim_text: Predominate areas of underutilization for females are in the Technicians category. Rail Traffic Controller (RTC) job titles were identified as areas of greatest opportunities.

tool_args.label: Underutilization - Minority Males in Skilled Crafts

payload.claim_text: Predominate areas of underutilization for minority males were in the Skilled Crafts categories. Sheetmetal workers and Machinists job titles were identified as areas of greatest opportunities.

tool_args.label: Most Cited Internal EEO Basis - Sexual Harassment

payload.claim_text: The most frequently cited basis internally was sexual harassment.

tool_args.label: Most Cited Title VI Basis - Race

payload.claim_text: The most frequently cited basis was Race.

tool_args.label: MNR has claim - minority male underutilization
MNR has claim - internal most frequent basis
